hyperedges.label: Recipe Discovery, Save and Translate Flow

nodes.label: Intercept NOTIFY_DEBUGGER_ABOUT_RX_PAGES and touch the pages.
nodes.norm_label: intercept notify_debugger_about_rx_pages and touch the pages.

nodes.label: Browse World Cuisines
nodes.rationale: Leverages TheMealDB API for structured browsing by cuisine category, providing a curated discovery path alongside freeform web search

nodes.label: Save Recipes to Meal-Time Categories
nodes.rationale: Uses Hive local storage to persist saved recipes organized by Turkish-named meal-time categories (Kahvaltı/Breakfast, Öğle Yemeği/Lunch, Akşam Yemeği/Dinner, Çay/Tea, Ara Öğün/Snack), reflecting the app's bilingual Turkish/English design

nodes.label: On-Device EN→TR Translation
nodes.rationale: Uses Google ML Kit Translation for offline-capable English-to-Turkish translation of recipe content, enabling Turkish-speaking users to understand foreign-language recipes without network dependency

nodes.label: Web Recipe Search
nodes.rationale: Integrates DuckDuckGo Instant Answer API to supplement structured TheMealDB data with freeform web recipe search results

nodes.label: Theme Customization
nodes.rationale: Offers color picker and dark/light mode toggle for personalized UI experience

nodes.label: Turkish/English Language Toggle
nodes.rationale: Uses Flutter Localizations to support full Turkish and English UI, including Turkish-named meal categories in the save workflow

nodes.label: Windows Runner Sources (flutter_window.cpp, main.cpp, utils.cpp, win32_window.cpp)
nodes.norm_label: windows runner sources (flutter_window.cpp, main.cpp, utils.cpp, win32_window.cpp)
